confirms.transfer:
Tuma TZS {amount} kwenda akaunti {account}?

Kitendo hiki hakiwezi kutenguliwa.
confirms.bill:
Lipa TZS {amount} kwa {biller}?

Kitendo hiki hakiwezi kutenguliwa.

phrases.Premium encrypted payments platform: Jukwaa la kisasa la malipo yaliyosimbwa
phrases.A modern fintech workspace for encrypted: Eneo la kisasa la fintech kwa pochi zilizosimbwa, miamala salama, malipo, na shughuli za kifedha zilizo tayari kwa ukaguzi.
phrases.Everything a fintech wallet needs: Kila kitu kinachohitajika na pochi ya fintech
phrases.Track balances, encrypted account number: Fuatilia salio, namba za akaunti zilizosimbwa, na shughuli za malipo kwenye dashibodi moja.
phrases.Send funds with validation, atomic updat: Tuma fedha kwa uthibitishaji, masasisho salama, na historia ya miamala iliyojumuishwa.
phrases.Pay common billers with clear references: Lipa watoa huduma kwa rejea wazi, kumbukumbu za ukaguzi, na ufuatiliaji wa hali.
phrases.Premium cards and visual metrics make ac: Kadi na vipimo vya kisasa hufanya shughuli za akaunti zisomeke kwa haraka.
phrases.Designed around encrypted financial reco: Imeundwa kulinda rekodi za kifedha zilizosimbwa
phrases.SecureMoney keeps the backend stack unch: SecureMoney huhifadhi muundo wa backend kama ulivyo huku ikitoa kiolesura bora kwa uthibitishaji, OTP, na salio lililosimbwa.
phrases.Enterprise fintech interface for secure: Kiolesura cha fintech kwa shughuli salama za malipo.
phrases.Transaction values remain encrypted at r: Thamani za miamala hubaki zimesimbwa zinapohifadhiwa.
phrases.Sign in to your SecureMoney account: Ingia kwenye akaunti yako ya SecureMoney
phrases.All session data and financial records a: Data zote za kipindi na rekodi za fedha zinasimbwa kwa AES-256-GCM. Nywila yako haihifadhiwi kamwe, huhifadhiwa hash ya PBKDF2 yenye marudio 600,000.
phrases.Bank-grade AES-256-GCM encryption protec: Usimbaji wa kiwango cha benki AES-256-GCM hulinda kila muamala. Fedha zako zinalindwa kwa uthibitisho wa kriptografia.
phrases.Zero plaintext stored in database: Hakuna maandishi wazi yanayohifadhiwa kwenye hifadhidata
phrases.Join thousands of users who trust Secure: Jiunge na watumiaji wanaoiamini SecureMoney kwa malipo salama ya kidijitali Tanzania.
phrases.Unique encrypted account number: Namba ya akaunti ya kipekee iliyosimbwa
phrases.Send & receive money instantly: Tuma na pokea pesa papo hapo
phrases.Pay bills: TANESCO, DAWASCO & more: Lipa bili: TANESCO, DAWASCO na zaidi
phrases.A one-time passcode has been sent to you: Nambari ya matumizi ya mara moja imetumwa kwenye barua pepe yako. Hatua hii huhakikisha ni wewe pekee unayeweza kufikia akaunti.
phrases.OTP hash stored — never plaintext: Hash ya OTP huhifadhiwa, si maandishi wazi
phrases.One-time use — replays are rejected: Matumizi ya mara moja, kurudia hukataliwa
phrases.In production, OTP is sent via email/SMS: Kwenye uzalishaji, OTP hutumwa kwa barua pepe/SMS. Kwenye maendeleo, tumia msimbo hapa chini:
phrases.This code is also printed to the Flask c: Msimbo huu pia unaonyeshwa kwenye koni ya Flask
phrases.in the database. Decryption occurs only: kwenye hifadhidata. Kufungua usimbaji hufanyika kwenye tabaka la programu pekee, hifadhidata haioni thamani wazi. Inazingatia
phrases.Transfer funds to another SecureMoney ac: Hamisha fedha kwenda akaunti nyingine ya SecureMoney
phrases.The transfer amount is encrypted with a: Kiasi cha muamala husimbwa kwa ufunguo wa kipekee uliotokana na PBKDF2 kabla ya kuhifadhiwa.
phrases.Debit and credit happen in a single data: Kutoa na kuongeza pesa hufanyika ndani ya muamala mmoja wa hifadhidata, makosa ya sehemu hurudishwa nyuma.
phrases.All transfers are recorded in the tamper: Miamala yote huandikwa kwenye kumbukumbu ya ukaguzi isiyochezewa.
phrases.Pay TANESCO, DAWASCO, NHIF, and more: Lipa TANESCO, DAWASCO, NHIF, na zaidi
phrases.Payment amount encrypted with AES-256-GC: Kiasi cha malipo husimbwa kwa AES-256-GCM kabla ya kuhifadhiwa
phrases.Full audit trail in tamper-proof log: Historia kamili ya ukaguzi kwenye kumbukumbu isiyochezewa
phrases.Email notification sent on successful pa: Arifa ya barua pepe hutumwa malipo yakifanikiwa
phrases.Operational oversight for SecureMoney au: Uangalizi wa shughuli za ukaguzi na afya ya jukwaa la SecureMoney.
phrases.Separate admin credential store: Hifadhi tofauti ya vitambulisho vya wasimamizi
phrases.No balance decryption access: Hakuna ruhusa ya kufungua usimbaji wa salio
phrases.Use the seeded admin credentials to cont: Tumia taarifa za msimamizi zilizoandaliwa kuendelea
phrases.You don't have permission to access this: Huna ruhusa ya kufikia ukurasa huu.
phrases.Too many requests. Please wait a moment: Maombi ni mengi sana. Tafadhali subiri kidogo kabla ya kujaribu tena.
phrases.Something went wrong on our end. Please: Kuna tatizo limetokea upande wetu. Tafadhali jaribu tena baadaye.

attributes.Account format: SM followed by 8 digits: Muundo wa akaunti: SM ikifuatiwa na tarakimu 8
